description_long: This object is a modern assault rifle, visually resembling the AK-47 platform with a combination of black and dark green components. The rifle features a long, cylindrical barrel with a front sight post and a flash hider at the muzzle. The handguard, pistol grip, and magazine are colored in dark green, contrasting with the predominantly black metal receiver and stock. The stock is a skeletonized, folding type, providing both structural support and reduced weight. The magazine is curved and detachable, typical of rifles designed for intermediate cartridges. The rifle includes iron sights and a prominent charging handle on the right side, with various small details such as a trigger guard, safety selector, and mounting rails.
description: A modern, black and green assault rifle with a skeletonized folding stock, curved detachable magazine, and iron sights. The design features a mix of metal and polymer components with a robust, tactical appearance.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: A full left-side profile reveals the skeletonized folding stock, curved green magazine, green handguard, and the overall length and details of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_2: Viewed from the rear, the rifle's stock and receiver are prominent, with the barrel and front sight aligned in the center, showing the symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: A full right-side profile highlights the charging handle, safety selector, and the same green and black color scheme, with the magazine and stock clearly visible.
